name: Mint Strawberry Coconut Cooler
instructions: Wash and clean all fresh ingredients thoroughly. Peel, chop, or slice the fresh produce (strawberries) as required for the recipe. Measure out the spices and seasonings (black salt, mint leaves) so they are ready for use. Keep all prepared items organized on your kitchen counter.

Prepare the liquid base for blending or brewing. Measure the required amount of lemon juice and pour it into your blender jar or cooking pot. Add standard flavor enhancers like black salt to the base.

Add the main flavorful ingredients to the base. Add the prepped fresh fruits or vegetables (strawberries) into the blender. Secure the lid tightly and blend on high speed for 1-2 minutes, or until the mixture reaches a completely smooth, consistent, and frothy texture with no remaining fruit chunks.

Uncover and assess the texture and thickness of the dish. Add finishing liquids like lemon juice (e.g. lemon juice or coconut milk) to enrich the body and flavor profile. Adjust the seasoning by adding remaining salt or fine spices (black salt, mint leaves). Let the dish simmer or blend for an additional 2-3 minutes to allow all the unique flavors to meld together beautifully.

Remove the dish from heat (or stop the blender) and prepare for presentation. Garnish generously with fresh herb leaves (mint leaves). Serve this healthy, gluten-free, and vegan Mint Strawberry Coconut Cooler warm (or chilled if it is a beverage) in beautiful serving bowls or glassware. Enjoy immediately!
description: A clean, gluten-free & vegan recipe from the Beverages & Drinks collection.

name: GF Oatmeal in Almond Milk

Keep all prepared items organized on your kitchen counter.

Heat a suitable pan or pot on medium-low heat and add a touch of coconut oil or ghee. Gently temper the whole spices or aromatics (such as salt) in the hot fat for 30-60 seconds until they become highly fragrant and release their natural oils. Be careful not to burn the base foundation.

Introduce the main ingredients to the tempered base. Stir in the grains or legumes (rolled oats) along with water or broth. Add the prepped vegetables (certified gf steel-cut) to the pot. instructions: Wash and clean all fresh ingredients thoroughly. Peel, chop, or slice the fresh produce (spinach) as required for the recipe. Measure out the spices and seasonings (turmeric, cumin, coriander powder) so they are ready for use. Keep all prepared items organized on your kitchen counter.

Heat a suitable pan or pot on medium-low heat and add a touch of boiled chickpeas. Gently temper the whole spices or aromatics (such as turmeric) in the hot fat for 30-60 seconds until they become highly fragrant and release their natural oils. Be careful not to burn the base foundation.

Introduce the main ingredients to the tempered base. Add the prepped vegetables (spinach) to the pot. Cover with a lid, reduce heat to medium-low, and let the mixture simmer gently. Stir occasionally to prevent sticking, and cook for 15-20 minutes until everything is tender and cooked through.

Uncover and assess the texture and thickness of the dish. Add finishing liquids like thick coconut milk (e.g. lemon juice or coconut milk) to enrich the body and flavor profile. Adjust the seasoning by adding remaining salt or fine spices (turmeric, cumin, coriander powder). Let the dish simmer or blend for an additional 2-3 minutes to allow all the unique flavors to meld together beautifully.

Remove the dish from heat (or stop the blender) and prepare for presentation. Garnish generously with fresh herb leaves (coriander powder). Serve this healthy, gluten-free, and vegan Curried Chickpeas, Spinach & Coconut Curry warm (or chilled if it is a beverage) in beautiful serving bowls or glassware. Enjoy immediately!
